description_long: This sculpture features three life-sized human figures standing atop a large, roughly hewn stone base. The figures are dressed in traditional, historical attire, each holding distinct objects such as a musical instrument and a scroll, suggesting a cultural or historical theme. The stone base is set on a square, flat platform, and a prominent metal plaque with inscriptions is mounted on the sloped front face of the stone. The figures are rendered in a dark bronze or metal finish, while the base appears to be made of a lighter, textured stone. The rear view reveals the detailed backs of the figures and the rough, unadorned stone. The overall composition is monumental and commemorative, likely intended for public display.
description: A group sculpture of three historically dressed figures on a large stone base with a metal plaque, rendered in bronze and stone. The work is detailed and commemorative, suitable for public urban spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three figures in full detail, the stone base, and the inscribed metal plaque prominently displayed.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the depth of the stone base and the side profiles of the figures, with the plaque visible at an angle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the three figures and the rough, unadorned stone base, with no plaque visible.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the figures in profile and the sloped stone base, with the plaque partially visible.
attribute_subject_matter: three human figures in traditional attire commemorating a historical or cultural theme
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is installed on a flat, paved surface, typical of outdoor urban plazas or public parks.
